title: Privacy Policy
intro: This policy explains what personal information FlyAir collects when you use flyair.lk, why we collect it, who we share it with, how long we keep it, how we protect it, and the rights you have over it. By using the Site you accept the practices described here. Questions? info@flyair.lk · 0788 788 788.

sections.p:
flyair.lk is the flights-focused brand of Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd (BR No PV 00214561), a Sri Lankan company licensed by the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA licence A-1710) and IATA accredited. We sit in a family of brands alongside travellers.lk (full-service travel) and Travellers Holidays (tour packages).

For privacy matters please contact us at info@flyair.lk or on 0788 788 788.

We collect information that you give us directly when you search, book or contact us:
• Identity — your name, date of birth, gender, nationality.
• Contact — email address, mobile phone number, postal address.
• Travel documents — passport number, expiry date, and where applicable visa details.
• Payment — card details entered into our payment provider (we do not store the full card number, CVV or expiry on our own servers — only a token reference).
• Preferences and special requests — meal preference, wheelchair assistance, infant bassinet, frequent-flyer number, seat preference, accessibility requirements.

We also collect information automatically about how you use the Site:
• Device and browser data — device type, operating system, browser, IP address, approximate location.
• Usage data — pages viewed, searches performed, time spent on the booking flow, referring URL.
• Cookie data — strictly-necessary, preference, analytics and marketing cookies as described in the Cookie Policy.

Finally, we receive information about your bookings from third parties — airlines, the global distribution systems we use, our payment provider, and our fraud-screening provider — for example PNRs, ticket numbers, schedule changes, refund updates and fraud-risk indicators.

We use the information you provide:
• To issue and manage your bookings and to send operational messages (confirmations, schedule changes, gate updates, refund status).
• To take payment, to verify it, and to detect or prevent fraudulent transactions.
• To provide customer support and process change, refund or other booking requests.
• To comply with our legal and regulatory obligations including tax, anti-fraud and aviation-security rules.

We use information collected automatically:
• To keep the Site secure and to investigate suspicious activity.
• To measure how features perform and to debug issues.
• To improve search ranking, fare comparisons and product recommendations.

With your consent, we also use contact details to send promotional messages (fare drops, newsletters, partner offers). You can withdraw consent at any time without it affecting any booking already made.

Cookies are small text files placed on your device by a website. We use four categories:
• Strictly-necessary cookies — required for the Site to function (search session, payment, security). You cannot opt out of these.
• Preference cookies — remember choices such as currency, language and recent searches.
• Analytics cookies — used only with your consent, to understand how visitors use the Site.
• Marketing cookies — used only with your consent, to measure campaign performance and show relevant offers off-site.

You can manage your cookie choices from the cookie banner on your first visit or via the Cookies link in the site footer, and from your browser settings at any time. The Cookie Policy has the full list of cookies set.

We share your information only with parties that need it to deliver your travel or to run our business:
• Operating airlines and connecting carriers for your booking — they receive the data needed to issue your ticket, manage check-in and contact you about your flight.
• Global distribution systems and ticket-issuing platforms — to ticket your booking and process schedule changes / refunds.
• Our payment provider — to process payment, refunds and chargebacks; they handle the card data on a PCI-DSS compliant platform.
• Our fraud-screening provider — to assess risk on each transaction.
• Customer-support and hosting providers — to deliver the Site and respond to your enquiries.
• Our sister brands travellers.lk and Travellers Holidays — where they handle a connected service for your trip (e.g. a visa application, a hotel reservation or a tour package).

We also share your information where we are required to by law or by a competent authority (regulators, courts, customs, law-enforcement) and to protect the rights, property or safety of FlyAir, our customers or others.

We DO NOT sell your personal information.

Airlines, distribution systems and many of our suppliers operate internationally, which means your information will sometimes be processed in a country other than the one you live in. Where we transfer personal information outside Sri Lanka we use safeguards such as standard contractual clauses or equivalent protections to make sure your information stays protected to a comparable standard.

sections.h: How long we keep your information
sections.p:
We keep booking information for as long as your booking is active and then for the periods we are required to under tax, accounting, regulatory and anti-fraud laws — generally up to seven years after the date of travel.

Marketing preferences are kept while you have an active account or until you ask us to remove them. Site analytics data is kept in aggregated form. Account credentials are kept while your account is active and deleted (or anonymised) on account closure.

sections.h: Security, credit cards and account information
sections.p:
flyair.lk is served over HTTPS with TLS 1.2 or higher, so the information you submit is encrypted between your browser and our servers. We also enforce HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) so your browser will refuse to talk to us over an unencrypted connection.

Payment is processed by a regulated payment provider on a PCI-DSS compliant gateway with 3-D Secure (One-Time Password / OTP) verification. We do NOT store your full card number, CVV or expiry date on our own servers — only a non-reversible token that lets us refer to the transaction for refunds and support.

When you create an account you choose a password for that account. You are responsible for keeping your password and account credentials confidential and for all activity that takes place under your account. Please notify us in writing as soon as possible of any unauthorised use of your password or account, or any other breach of security; FlyAir is not liable for losses caused by unauthorised use of your password or account, with or without your knowledge.

Where we suspect fraud, where we are extending credit-based services, or where we are required to verify identity for compliance reasons, we may verify the information you provide and (in anonymised or aggregated form, except where the law requires otherwise) share it with our payment, fraud-screening and credit-assessment partners.

No online system can guarantee 100% security, but we take the protection of your data seriously and continually monitor our systems for unusual activity. Personal data may be shared with concerned law-enforcement agencies for any lawful or investigation purpose without prior notice.

When you give us your contact details we may use them to send you operational messages about your booking — confirmations, schedule changes, refund status, payment confirmations and similar — via SMS, internet-based messaging (e.g. WhatsApp), voice call, email or any other channel you provided. These messages are transactional, not unsolicited commercial communication, and are sent in compliance with the relevant guidelines of the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL) and equivalent regulators in any other country we contact you in.

We may also use these channels to contact you about a pending or failed booking to help you complete it.

Marketing messages (fare alerts, newsletters, partner offers) are only sent with your consent. You can opt out at any time using the unsubscribe link in the relevant message or from your account.

If you provide a wrong phone number or email address that causes someone else to receive your booking messages, or you raise an inaccurate complaint about the messages we sent at your request, you agree to indemnify us against any resulting loss.

You have the right to:
• Access — ask for a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
• Correction — ask us to fix anything inaccurate.
• Deletion — ask us to delete information we no longer need for a legitimate purpose.
• Restriction or objection — limit or object to certain types of processing.
• Withdraw consent — turn off any processing that is based on your consent (for example marketing).
• Data portability — receive a structured copy of certain personal information you provided to us.

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the data-protection regulator in Sri Lanka if you believe we have not handled your information correctly.

To exercise any of these rights, contact info@flyair.lk. We will respond to verified requests within 30 days.

Operational messages about a booking you have made cannot be opted out of while that booking is active — we need to contact you about schedule changes, gate updates, refund status, etc.

Promotional messages (fare drops, newsletters, partner offers) are only sent with consent. Every promotional email has a one-click unsubscribe link, and you can change your preferences at any time from your account.

FlyAir is intended for adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information directly from children under the age of 16; their details are collected from a parent or guardian when an adult books on their behalf.

Internet transmissions are not always completely private or secure. You understand that any message or information you send to the Site may, despite the safeguards above, be read or intercepted by others unless explicitly noted as encrypted (for example card details).

The copyright in the contents of this website belongs to Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd. Copying part or all of the Site without our permission is prohibited, except where copying is necessary for you to use the services you have paid for (for example printing your itinerary).

We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in our service, our technology, or applicable law. The current version is always on this page with the date of the last review at the top.

Material changes will be flagged on the Site for a reasonable period before they take effect, and where we rely on your consent for a new use, we will ask for that consent before starting.

If you have a question about this policy, want to exercise any of your rights, or want to report a privacy or security concern, please write to us at info@flyair.lk, call 0788 788 788, or post to Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd, Colombo, Sri Lanka. We will respond to verified requests within 30 days.
